SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-02-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-02-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT AND WAIVES SERVICE, WHICH IS UNTIMELY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-28-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCT-02-2017 AT 6:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JENNIFER CHAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LUSHENG LIU IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY CHAN, JENNIFER AS TO DEFENDANT LIU, LUSHENG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-28-2017 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (2 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF CHAN, JENNIFER
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-02-2017 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHAN, JENNIFER IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LIU, LUSHENG PLAINTIFF'S CHIROPRACTIC TREATMENT IS NOT EXPLAINED BY THE LOW IMPACT, MINOR FRONT END CONTACT BETWEEN DEFENDANT'S AND PLAINTIFF'S VEHICLES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
